recommendations: Promote guarded single-target apply support for filter.relative_date.on_or_before_today based on v15 wrong-value repair plus independent panel readback evidence.
Keep browser actions gated by this map: schema-supported plus UI option evidence before mutation.
Do not generalize this primitive to broad rollout until additional target classes are tested beyond Operator Tools Registry::WBS09 - Validation Due.

post_generation_validation.validated_recovery_case: wrong relative-date value repaired to today after today was not initially visible
post_generation_validation.verification_method: after-click verification plus independent refresh/reselect Filter/Sort panel readback
